articles.title: Iran will continue to defend itself against aggression, ambassador to UK says
articles.summary: Seyed Ali Mousavi tells Laura Kuenssberg Iran's response depends on the actions of the US and Israel.

articles.title: Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine war
articles.summary: Ukraine has embarked on a programme to deploy armed robots on the battlefield against Russian forces.

articles.title: We've been speaking to Iranians during one week of war. Here's what they said
articles.summary: Ordinary Iranians reflect on seven days of conflict and where they see their country going next.

articles.title: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
articles.summary: Flights in and out of Nairobi Airport have been disrupted while some roads in the capital are submerged.

articles.title: Israeli troops push into Lebanon for yet another war with Iran's proxy Hezbollah
articles.summary: The BBC sees troops and tanks massing near the border, as speculation mounts that Israel is planning a full-scale ground invasion to fight Hezbollah.

articles.title: 'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC
articles.summary: Suspected Islamist militants reportedly seized control of a village for two days before being forced out by troops and air strikes.

articles.title: Swiss to vote on right-wing push to slash licence fee for public broadcaster
articles.summary: The move is backed by the right-wing Swiss People's Party, which says the current fee is unjustified because of the high cost of living.

articles.title: Russian strike on Kharkiv apartment block kills ten
articles.summary: Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelensky says other people - including children - are injured as rescuers continue to search through rubble.

articles.title: China spent years building ties in Latin America. Can Trump make room for the US?
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump will meet with ideologically-aligned Latin American leaders to try and counter China's influence in the region.

articles.title: Indonesia to ban social media and other online platforms for under 16s
articles.summary: It is the latest country to curb young people's access to digital spaces to try and protect them from abuse.
